overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a tactical shooter game set in an indoor CQB training facility with wooden structures and target dummies. The player aims down sights, fires at a distant target, then moves through doorways to explore a side room before returning to the main corridor.

agents.ego_description: aiming down weapon sights at a distant target and firing

human-shaped yellow paper target on stand in the distance
cylindrical concrete barrier on the ground

segments.scene_description: The player stands in a covered training courtyard with wooden structures on the left and a distant yellow target downrange. The environment is artificially lit with overhead lights. The player aims down sights and fires at the target.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor leading to side room

events.description: player moves from open courtyard into enclosed corridor and doorway

agents.ego_description: turning right and moving through a doorway into a narrow corridor

wooden wall paneling of the narrow corridor
wooden wall paneling on the right side

segments.scene_description: After firing, the player turns right and enters a narrow corridor with wooden walls on both sides, transitioning from the open courtyard to an enclosed indoor space.

scene_state.functional_zone: small enclosed training room with close-range target

events.description: entering small side room with illuminated yellow target

agents.ego_description: entering a small room and examining the yellow target dummy up close

entered.detail: human-shaped yellow target dummy positioned close to the player
wooden wall of the small training room
wooden wall on the right side of the room
small window with light visible in the back wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a small enclosed training room containing a yellow target dummy at close range. The room has wooden walls and a small window in the back wall letting in light.

events.description: exiting side room back to main training area
raising weapon to aim down sights along the corridor

agents.ego_description: exiting the room and aiming down the main corridor of the training facility

entered.detail: long corridor of the training facility with overhead lighting
fluorescent light strips illuminating the corridor

segments.scene_description: The player exits the side room back into the main training area, where the two-story wooden structure is visible again on the left. The player raises their weapon to aim down the long corridor ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective that moves from an open training courtyard into a series of enclosed wooden structures before returning to a main corridor. It begins with the player aiming down sights and firing at a distant yellow target under artificial overhead lighting. As the shot progresses, the camera turns right and transitions from the open courtyard into a narrow, wooden-walled corridor. The movement then leads into a small enclosed training room featuring a close-range target dummy and a small window in the back wall, before the camera exits the room to return to the main training area. Finally, the scene opens back up to reveal the two-story wooden structure on the left as the player raises their weapon to aim down the long corridor ahead.
